scope: Queue FSM store Postgres dialect foundation only; repository claim/recovery ports remain later P074 children.
done: Added backend-aware FSM store behavior using db.backend_name, defaulting to sqlite.
Kept sqlite JSON text behavior and standalone commit behavior intact.
Added Postgres path that preserves native JSON-compatible payload values for JSONB binding.
Added Postgres path that requires explicit transactions for mutating FSM operations.
Added Postgres deterministic ordering helpers using created_at/id instead of rowid.
Added Postgres unique-violation detection via SQLSTATE 23505 or UniqueViolation class name.
Ensured Postgres path does not retry SQLite busy-looking errors.
